# Lila Park

> Evidence-based perimenopause wellness, Korean food science, and sleep research for women in their 40s and 50s. Written by Lila Park, a Korean-American circadian wellness researcher.

Lila Park explores the intersection of Korean saenghwal (daily life) traditions and modern sleep and hormonal science. Content is written for women navigating perimenopause who want evidence-based guidance grounded in Korean wellness philosophy.

## Core Topics

- Perimenopause sleep disruption — causes, architecture changes, and interventions
- Korean foods and adaptogens for hormonal balance and sleep
- Circadian rhythm and cortisol regulation in midlife women
- Korean skincare for perimenopause skin changes
- Breathwork, movement, and daily habits for energy and resilience

## Key Articles

- [Why Perimenopause Wrecks Your Sleep](https://lilapark.xyz/perimenopause-insomnia)
- [Can You Catch Up on Lost Sleep?](https://lilapark.xyz/cant-catch-up-on-sleep)
- [Why You're Exhausted After 8 Hours](https://lilapark.xyz/exhausted-after-8-hours)
- [Waking at 3am — Cortisol and Perimenopause](https://lilapark.xyz/3am-waking-perimenopause-cortisol)
- [Adaptogens for Perimenopause](https://lilapark.xyz/adaptogens-perimenopause)
- [Korean Foods for Perimenopause Sleep](https://lilapark.xyz/korean-foods-perimenopause-sleep)
- [Perimenopause Fatigue — What's Actually Happening](https://lilapark.xyz/perimenopause-fatigue)
- [Your Gut Is Your Second Brain](https://lilapark.xyz/gut-second-brain)
- [Korean Skincare for Perimenopause Skin](https://lilapark.xyz/korean-skincare-perimenopause)
- [Perimenopause Sleep Environment Setup](https://lilapark.xyz/perimenopause-sleep-environment)
- [Physiological Sigh — Better Than 4-7-8](https://lilapark.xyz/breathwork-better-than-478)
- [The 3pm Crash Isn't Normal](https://lilapark.xyz/3pm-crash-not-normal)
- [Move Like a Korean Grandma](https://lilapark.xyz/move-like-korean-grandma)
- [Nunchi — The Korean Art of Reading the Room](https://lilapark.xyz/nunchi-korean-art)
- [The 5-Minute Morning Habit](https://lilapark.xyz/morning-habit-5-minutes)
- [Perimenopause Brain Fog](https://lilapark.xyz/perimenopause-brain-fog)
- [Perimenopause Anxiety](https://lilapark.xyz/perimenopause-anxiety)

- [Magnesium for Perimenopause](https://lilapark.xyz/magnesium-perimenopause)

## About

Lila Park is a Korean-American researcher and writer based in the US. All content is evidence-based with citations to peer-reviewed research. Articles are written for informational purposes and do not constitute medical advice.

Site: https://lilapark.xyz
